name: Right Lateral Cut – Ideal Form
description: Ideal biomechanical right lateral cut sequence. Athlete begins in athletic ready stance, performs a controlled weight shift right with knee bend to ~90 degrees, plants right foot with good ankle dorsiflexion, knees tracking over toes (no valgus), torso upright (<5° lean), hips level throughout, then explosively cuts left. 30 frames over 2.0 seconds captured at ~15 fps.
